steps.title: Add a second reason
steps.content: The previous sentence gives one reason Houston Black is a fitting state soil: it is abundant across Texas. The next sentence gives another supporting reason: it plays an important role in agriculture and helps grow crops such as corn and soybeans.

steps.title: Choose an additive transition
steps.content: Choice B, "At that time," would require a specific time reference, but none is being introduced. Choice C, "By contrast," signals opposition, and Choice D, "Alternatively," signals a substitute option. The two sentences add related reasons supporting the same claim, so an additive transition is needed. The answer is A.
